productDisplayName: Lotto Men Millennia White Sports Shoe
description: Designed for the runners who never compromise on style and comfort, the Millenia running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a wrap around heel band and stitch detailing for enhanced durability Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Pull loop at the tongue for ease of wear Padded tongue and collar with a mesh lining for breathable comfort and snug fit Mildly padded footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with modified herringbone grooves on the medial length and circular lugs on the lateral length for enhanced grip and traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and big toe for ease 180 degree movement of the foot Flex groove on the forefoot for easy movement shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
